examples: Their much vaunted reforms did not materialize.
If you want your kids to have strong self-esteem and the confidence that they can solve hard problems, those qualities won't magically materialize in high school.
The particles that materialize in the space make the charge manifest.
This year it is even more difficult, as the hoped-for economic recovery failed to materialize.
The officers materialize to apprehend them when the drivers attempt to drive their vehicles.
